texto: The art is in evolving to such a receptive consciousness, which is aligned to enjoyment and fruition in both ways – expecting and planning the randomizations for ‘specific’ joys as well as designing joys in ‘generic’ randomizations. True love lands you in a consciousness, which relishes the joys of this rainbowish dualism best.
explicacao: Citação de Santosh Jha sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “The art is in evolving to such a receptive consciousness, which is aligned to enjoyment and fruit…” articula amor, consciousness, intimacy em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como dia-chuvoso e intimacy.
